prompt: Light-theme personal relationship intelligence app. Inspired by folk.app (minimal.gallery SAAS) clean white Foundersgrotesk aesthetic and letta.com memory-first agent concept. Features: home dashboard with relationship health metrics, people roster with AI memory snippets and strength bars, person detail with memory timeline threads, Memory Palace topic cluster visualization, AI-compose with relationship context, Pulse analytics dashboard. Warm off-white #F5F4F1 bg, electric blue #3A5CFF accent, coral #FF6B35 secondary.
